title: Miconia mantuensis
taxonomy: Miconia mantuensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the genus Miconia, which comprises approximately 1,000 species of plants. The family Melastomataceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the melastome family. This family is native to the Americas, with some species found in Africa and Asia. Miconia mantuensis is a plant species that is native to Ecuador.
